expected_features: exact five-signal catalog remains on the existing publisher lineage

production config inputs are read-only and are not copied into the candidate worktree
logs, shadow artifacts, backtests, and other writable paths remain candidate-local
focused regression locks S3-only path binding and non-S3 path isolation
runtime proof remains unclaimed until the final MiniPC GET-only acceptance
